title: Cobblemon [April Fool's]
description: Cobblemon's Official April Fool's Datapack Addon.
body:
## Cobblemon's Official April Fool's Datapack Addon. 

To install, boot up the correlating version of [Cobblemon](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon) and add the datapack to the world file.

![New PC Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/LbUEZsee/images/87f2b457a8c0ea17e17709ba2c8ef57125876626.png)

![New Healing Machine Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/LbUEZsee/images/f582f7e08df5ef3640fce994e66e73354a2f6203.png)

![New Poké Ball Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/LbUEZsee/images/680656c5bbc0e0ecf873584f13080845ab5e0d5c.png)
